query: SELECT e.id, e.evseIdLocal, e.connectorId, e.connector_status, cs.name, cs.ocppIdentity FROM evses e JOIN charging_stations cs ON e.stationId = cs.id ORDER BY cs.id, e.evseIdLocal;
